issues: God file: 7 service classes in one file
deleteComment method: 167 lines, CC>15
Auth check boilerplate repeated 13 times

SafeCommentsService and CollectionService.*Safe are dead code

75% dead code (logError, getUserMessage, isSuccess, handleFormError never called)
console.error not dev-gated (logs in production)
Error message matching uses hardcoded strings
compressImage: ObjectURL never revoked (memory leak)

2 empty catch blocks in compressImage
sanitizeFormattedContent is dead code
linkifyText produces raw HTML (XSS surface if misused)

retryAuth duplicates initializeAuth logic
13 setState calls - strong candidate for useReducer

getVoteData depends on voteData state - defeats useMemo, causes all consumers to re-render
{ count: 0, hasVoted: false } default repeated 5 times
Map clone-and-update pattern repeated 5 times
Context value object not memoized - causes unnecessary consumer re-renders
4 console.error calls not dev-gated (log in production)
Error handler pattern duplicated 4 times internally
setupRealtimeSubscriptions: 126 lines
isConnected returns ref.current not state - never triggers re-renders (BUG)
2 empty catch blocks silently swallow connection errors
No timeout on subscription promises (may hang indefinitely)
'@illinois.edu' hardcoded instead of shared constant
No unmount cancellation for async effect
BUG: if(loading) return guard + loading=true initial state = loadProjects never executes
BUG: window.location.href causes full page reload instead of SPA navigation
Stats refresh logic duplicated after status change and delete
Stats card layout repeated 7 times
JSX nesting 8 levels deep
DashboardProject type duplicates fields from other files

2 empty catch blocks swallow all errors silently
Sequential fetches should be parallel with Promise.all
Uses confirm() instead of DeleteProjectModal
projects.sort() mutates array during render
Uncoordinated parallel fetches (no Promise.all)
setTimeout with no cleanup (navigate on unmounted component)
Hardcoded stats ('50+', '120+', '15+') contradict live Statistics component
Largest component: 489 lines, CC~18

Auth-check-then-navigate duplicated verbatim
2 floating promises in onClick handlers
Unsafe double cast: data as unknown as Project[]
Constants declared inside component (useCallback dep issue)
handleDelete: 87 lines
Directly imports supabase client (breaks abstraction layer)
CommentData type duplicated with CommentList.tsx
3 silent catch blocks
No keyboard trap for modal accessibility
No Escape key handler

5 levels of context provider nesting

ui.reason: shadcn/ui generated components - do not modify

bugs.description: loadProjects never executes: loading initialized to true, guard returns early on loading=true
bugs.fix: Remove the if(loading) return guard or initialize loading to false

bugs.description: window.location.href causes full page reload instead of SPA navigation, destroying all in-memory state
isConnected returns ref.current not state - never triggers re-renders in consumers
bugs.fix: Add useState for isConnected alongside the ref

bugs.description: getVoteData useCallback depends on voteData, defeating useMemo and causing all consumers to re-render on every vote
bugs.fix: Use a ref for voteData inside getVoteData callback

bugs.description: Array.sort() mutates projects state during render

security.description: Search input interpolated into PostgREST .or() filter - potential filter injection
security.fix: Sanitize search input or use parameterized filtering

security.description: linkifyText produces raw HTML strings used with dangerouslySetInnerHTML
security.fix: Ensure output is always sanitized before rendering; consider using a React component approach

security.description: console.error in production leaks error details to browser console

duplication.loadingSpinner: 16+ instances across all pages and components
duplication.emptyState: 8+ instances of dashed-border empty state pattern
duplication.projectTypes: 5+ overlapping inline type definitions (DashboardProject, TrendingProject, FeaturedProject, ProjectData, ProjectListItem)
duplication.commentDataType: Duplicated verbatim between CommentItem.tsx and CommentList.tsx
duplication.collectionForm: Nearly identical between NewCollectionPage and EditCollectionPage
duplication.illinoisDomain: 'illinois.edu' string in 3 files without shared constant

batch1_bugs_and_security.description: Fix active bugs and security issues

batch2_database_decomposition.description: Split database.ts god file into focused service modules

batch3_shared_abstractions.description: Extract duplicated patterns into shared components and utilities

batch4_context_refactor.description: Refactor contexts and hooks for correctness and performance

batch6_dead_code_and_cleanup.description: Remove dead code, fix silent failures, gate production logs

batch7_page_consistency.description: Apply shared abstractions to all pages, unify patterns
